description.bm: Kontrak sumber khusus bagi set data pemilih P134 yang telah dinyahpengenal sebelum kemasukan ke PIP.
description.en: Source-specific contract for the P134 voter dataset pseudonymised before PIP ingestion.

field_mappings.notes: Primary source identity key. Derive VOTER_ID_HASH with HMAC-SHA256 using stable PIP_VOTER_HASH_SALT; never use VTR_ID directly as public graph ID.
Display/diagnostic label only. Not a natural-person name and not a canonical identity.
Treat as sensitive political data. Preserve source value and source lineage.

derived_fields.privacy_rule: Never expose raw VTR_ID as public graph identifier.

derived_fields.derivation: split LOKALITI at first '.' and preserve left component as text
split LOKALITI at first '.' and preserve right component
split DM at first '.' and preserve left component as text
split DM at first '.' and preserve right component
split DUN at first '.' and preserve left component as text
split DUN at first '.' and preserve right component
split PARLIMEN at first '.' and preserve left component as text
split PARLIMEN at first '.' and preserve right component
split NEGERI at first '.' and preserve left component as text
split NEGERI at first '.' and preserve right component

compatibility.important_note: Current v1.0 profiler/cleanser strict mode was originally hard-coded for 47 source fields. This 41-field contract is valid for non-strict contract loading, but strict execution requires a source-count-aware patch before use.
required_next_engineering_patch: make profiler strict source-field count contract-driven
make cleanser strict source-field count contract-driven
make transformer identity derivation accept VTR_ID
make pipeline expected source-field count read from source contract

contract_history.change: Added 7 PDPA fields (NO_RUMAH, ALAMAT1-3, POSKOD, BANGSA, AGAMA) to privacy_removed_fields per ENGINE-INTEGRATION.md §10.2 (gate 7).
